title: Roasted Gooey Kenyan Vermicelli Rice Noodles
description: A rich and savory dish featuring roasted vermicelli rice noodles smothered in a sweet glaze.

ingredients.name: Vermicelli rice noodles
ingredients.notes: look for Kenyan brand or a substitute with similar flavor profile

instructions: Cook vermicelli noodles according to package instructions.
In a large pan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat. Add onions and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger, cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add chopped tomatoes, beef broth, honey, lime juice, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let the glaze cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a separate bowl, mix 1 tablespoon of oil with 1 tablespoon of honey.
Add cooked vermicelli noodles to the bowl and toss to coat with the honey-oil mixture.
Transfer noodles to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Pour the glaze over the noodles and toss to coat evenly.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the glaze is caramelized and the noodles are golden brown.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
